note: Appending a cell to a row is unusual — normally cells are seeded at row-Add time. This op exists for completeness.

baseline.description: first run baseline offset for the cell text (percent units; positive=raised).

gridSpan.description: horizontal merge span — number of grid columns this cell spans (>=2 means merged across). Setting gridSpan=N also stamps hMerge=true on the next (N-1) cells in the same row, matching the convenience prop merge.right.

hmerge.description: true on cells continued from a horizontal merge anchor (CT_TableCell @hMerge).

vmerge.description: true on cells continued from a vertical merge anchor (CT_TableCell @vMerge). Surfaced by Query for table cells.

image.relId.description: relationship id of an embedded image used as the cell's blip fill.

border.all.description: all four cell edges. Format: 'WIDTH[ DASH][ COLOR]' (e.g. '1pt solid FF0000') or 'STYLE;WIDTH;COLOR[;DASH]' (style ignored — kept for docx parity). DASH ∈ solid|dot|dash|lgDash|dashDot|sysDot|sysDash. Use 'none' to clear. Alias: border. Stored as a:lnL/lnR/lnT/lnB on a:tcPr. Cross-format note: docx only accepts the semicolon form 'STYLE;SIZE;COLOR' — pptx is more lenient.

border.bottom.description: bottom border. Format: STYLE[;SIZE[;COLOR[;SPACE]]]. Cross-format note: pptx accepts a space-separated 'WIDTH DASH COLOR' form; docx only accepts the semicolon form 'STYLE;SIZE;COLOR' (SIZE is in 1/8 pt units).

border.left.description: left border. Format: STYLE[;SIZE[;COLOR[;SPACE]]]. Cross-format note: pptx accepts a space-separated 'WIDTH DASH COLOR' form; docx only accepts the semicolon form 'STYLE;SIZE;COLOR' (SIZE is in 1/8 pt units).

border.right.description: right border. Format: STYLE[;SIZE[;COLOR[;SPACE]]]. Cross-format note: pptx accepts a space-separated 'WIDTH DASH COLOR' form; docx only accepts the semicolon form 'STYLE;SIZE;COLOR' (SIZE is in 1/8 pt units).

border.tl2br.description: diagonal from top-left to bottom-right (a:lnTlToBr). Format same as border.all. Cross-format note: docx only accepts the semicolon form 'STYLE;SIZE;COLOR' — pptx is more lenient. Add/Set only — Get does not surface diagonal borders today.
border.tl2br.readback: n/a (Get does not surface diagonal borders)

border.top.description: top border. Format: STYLE[;SIZE[;COLOR[;SPACE]]]. Cross-format note: pptx accepts a space-separated 'WIDTH DASH COLOR' form; docx only accepts the semicolon form 'STYLE;SIZE;COLOR' (SIZE is in 1/8 pt units).

border.tr2bl.description: diagonal from top-right to bottom-left (a:lnBlToTr). Format same as border.all. Cross-format note: docx only accepts the semicolon form 'STYLE;SIZE;COLOR' — pptx is more lenient. Add/Set only — Get does not surface diagonal borders today.
border.tr2bl.readback: n/a (Get does not surface diagonal borders)
